headline: Bitcoin is cratering, but a new Wall Street crypto hype is on the rise
summary: As bitcoin dropped to its lowest price since 2024, investors flock to a new type of crypto investment linked to the hyperliquid platforms, HYPE ETFs.

headline: BDC Redemptions Are Knocking - So Is Opportunity
summary: BDC redemptions are back. I think that there are some clear winners here. Learn how outflows may pressure NAVs and spark more redemptions.
